Notes: Got totally thrashed on this but had such a blast doing it! Couldn't make much progress because I accidentally left my gloves on Mammoth Terraces >:|

SO fun getting trashed on this line! Blew the onsight about 15 feet up, then hung a ton and aided a bit through the crux. Saw a bunch of bats hanging in the crack but I took so long to get to 'em that they cleared out. What a blast!
Pretty fun approach pitch for Butterballs, a good warmup!
